name: Dark Maildramon

signature_move.name: Dark Wing
signature_move.description: Flaps its tattered wings, causing dark bullets to rain down.

description: A form of Maildramon , who is Knightmon 's servant and acquired the power of " Miracles ", that found righteousness in evil after abandoning justice. Its Chrome Digizoid armor has been dyed a dark color, and it is looking for a heart of darkness in its master, Knightmon. If it is a Knightmon with a strong evil heart, then it will be obedient to them, but if it senses even a shred of conscience, it will crush even its own master under its bulk. Its Special Move is flapping its tattered wings, causing dark bullets to rain down ( Dark Wing ).
